creator: ade@FreeBSD.org
text:
In the ongoing aim of autotools happiness, I need to do the following:

devel/autoconf268	-> devel/autoconf
devel/automake111	-> devel/automake
devel/libtool22		-> devel/libtool
devel/libltdl22		-> devel/libltdl

My cvs-fu is lacking at this point.  Do we even care if history is
preserved (given that all the target destinations already exist), or can I
just sledgehammer it?

Fix: 

N/A
How-To-Repeat: 
N/A
